_comment: Single source of truth for the intro-film narration. The film (src/introfilm.jsx) reads caption + dur from here for each scene; scripts/render_voiceover.py reads 'speech' to render frontend/public/vo.{mp3,json} via ElevenLabs. 'dur' (ms) is only used by the no-recording fallback engine. Keep scene 'key' values in sync with the View map in introfilm.jsx. Speech spells the brand phonetically (Cree-ay-teest, Meez) so any voice says it right; captions show the real spelling.

scenes.caption: Have you ever been in a position where the menu was flawless — but the business behind it ran on sticky notes, spreadsheets and midnight messages?
scenes.speech: Have you ever been in a position where the menu was flawless — but the business behind it was running on sticky notes, spreadsheets, and midnight messages?

scenes.caption: Where weddings were priced from memory, the van was packed at 2 a.m. — and a new client slipped away because their enquiry sat unread?
scenes.speech: Where weddings were priced from memory, the van was packed at two in the morning — and a new client slipped away, because their enquiry sat unread?

scenes.caption: Welcome to The Creatiste Command — the comprehensive management platform and one-stop shop designed for chefs, caterers and all culinary professionals.
scenes.speech: Welcome to The Cree-ay-teest Command — the comprehensive management platform, and one-stop shop, designed for chefs, caterers, and all culinary professionals.

scenes.caption: Bookings, tastings and clients. Recipes, inventory, shopping and packing. Quotes, invoices and finances. Your team, routes and suppliers — and Mise, your AI sous-chef (as in mise en place).
scenes.speech: Bookings, tastings and clients. Recipes, inventory, shopping and packing. Quotes, invoices and finances. Your team, your routes, your suppliers — and Meez, your A.I. sous-chef — as in meez-on-plass.

scenes.caption: It replaces the scattered apps, the spreadsheets and the guesswork with one calm, beautiful command centre — built by a caterer who has lived your prep days.
scenes.speech: It replaces the scattered apps, the spreadsheets, and the guesswork, with one calm, beautiful command centre — built by a caterer who has lived your prep days.

scenes.caption: And here it is — your command centre. Today's bookings, your prep, the shopping list and the numbers, calm and all in one screen.
scenes.speech: And here it is — your command centre. Today's bookings, your prep list, the shopping, and your numbers. All calm — all in one screen.

scenes.caption: Create your account, book your welcome call, and your five-day free trial begins — no card needed. Take command of your craft, with The Creatiste Command.
scenes.speech: Create your account, book your welcome call, and your five-day free trial begins — no card needed. Take command of your craft, with The Cree-ay-teest Command.
